name: Lemon Herb Pasta
description: Silky pasta brightened with lemon, herbs, and parmesan.
steps: Toss with lemon, parmesan, herbs, and pasta water.

name: Garden Shakshuka
description: Eggs gently poached in a warmly spiced tomato and pepper sauce.
steps: Add eggs, cover, and cook until set.

name: Golden Chickpea Bowl
description: Crisp spiced chickpeas, greens, grains, and a creamy dressing.
steps: Assemble and spoon over yogurt dressing.

name: Cozy Tomato Soup
description: A velvety roasted tomato soup for slow, cozy evenings.

name: Miso Glazed Salmon
description: Caramelized salmon with savory miso and ginger.

name: Apple Cinnamon Oats
description: Creamy morning oats with warm apples and cinnamon.
steps: Top oats with apples and maple syrup.
